description: A taxpayer owes taxes but cannot pay the full amount at once. They want to set up a monthly payment plan with the IRS.

nodes.task_description: Determine the total tax amount owed by the taxpayer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the final balance due.

nodes.task_description: Check the taxpayer's eligibility for the Online Payment Agreement (OPA) program.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the taxpayer meets the criteria for a streamlined installment agreement.

nodes.task_description: Complete and submit Form 9465, Installment Agreement Request, with the tax return.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully prepares and files the request for a payment plan.
